title: Use Constraints for Better Outputs
lesson_text: Always tell the model the format, length, tone, audience, and success criteria. Constraints reduce fluff and improve consistency.
example_prompt: Write a 150-word LinkedIn post for financial advisors. Tone: sharp, practical, data-driven. End with one CTA.

title: Give the Model a Job
lesson_text: Assign a role before the task. Good roles narrow the style and decision framework.
example_prompt: Act as a B2B SaaS growth strategist. Diagnose why this landing page is underperforming: [paste copy].
